[tier 1/exact] call gcp.connectors.projects.locations.global.customConnectors.customConnectorVersions.list, iterate response["customConnectorVersions"][], extract item["name"] → fill {customConnectorVersionId}

gcp.connectors.projects.locations.custom.description: Publish request for the CustomConnectorVersion. Once approved, the CustomConnectorVersion will be published as PartnerConnector.

required.description: Required. Resource name of the form: `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/customConnectors/{custom_connector}/custom

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.connectors.projects.locations.global.customConnectors.list, iterate response["customConnectors"][], extract item["name"] → fill {customConnectorId}

[tier 1/exact] call gcp.connectors.projects.locations.global.customConnectors.customConnectorVersions.list, iterate response["customConnectorVersions"][], extract item["name"] → fill {customConnectorVersionId}
